translations: (the) misfortune (is because) of what have earned
puzzle.hint: This verse connects accountability for one's actions with the vastness of Allah's mercy and forgiveness.
puzzle.arabic: وَمَآ أَصَـٰبَكُم مِّن مُّصِيبَةٍۢ فَبِمَا كَسَبَتْ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَيَعْفُوا۟ عَن كَثِيرٍۢ
puzzle.verseEn: And whatever strikes you of disaster - it is for what your hands have earned; but He pardons much.
